---
title: "Project 1"
format: 
  dashboard:
    theme: [litera]
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.navbar { display: none; }</style>
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(plotly)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

data <- readRDS("df.rds")

party_colors <- c(
  "SDP" = "#F54B4B",
  "KOK" = "#003A54",
  "KESK" = "#3BAD2E",
  "VIHR" = "#76B72A",
  "VAS" = "#F00A64",
  "PS" = "#002395",
  "RKP" = "#007AC9",
  "KD" = "#118DFF",
  "LIIK" = "#cf83c8",
  "Muut" = "#000000"
)

party_data <- data |>
  group_by(puolueen_ryhman_nimilyhenne_suomeksi) |>
  summarise(total_votes = sum(aanet_yhteensa_lkm, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(percentage = (total_votes / sum(total_votes)) * 100) |>
  arrange(desc(total_votes)) |>
  head(10) |>
  mutate(
    label = paste0(format(round(percentage, 1), decimal.mark = ","), " %")
  )
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
cat('<a href="../index.html" class="back-link">← Back</a>')
```

## Chart

```{r}
plot_ly(party_data,
        x = ~percentage,
        y = ~reorder(puolueen_ryhman_nimilyhenne_suomeksi, percentage),
        type = "bar",
        orientation = "h",
        color = ~puolueen_ryhman_nimilyhenne_suomeksi,
        colors = party_colors,
        hovertext = ~paste0(puolueen_ryhman_nimilyhenne_suomeksi, ": ",
                            format(round(percentage, 1), decimal.mark = ","), " %"),
        hoverinfo = "text") |>
  layout(
    showlegend = FALSE,
    xaxis = list(title = "", 
             range = c(0, max(party_data$percentage) * 1.3),
             showgrid = FALSE,
             showline = FALSE,
             showticklabels = FALSE,
             title = ""),
    yaxis = list(title = "",
                 showgrid = FALSE),
    paper_bgcolor = "white",
    plot_bgcolor = "white",
    annotations = lapply(1:nrow(party_data), function(i) {
      list(
        x = party_data$percentage[i],
        y = party_data$puolueen_ryhman_nimilyhenne_suomeksi[i],
        text = paste0("<b>", party_data$label[i], "</b>"),
        showarrow = FALSE,
        xanchor = "left",
        xshift = 5,
        font = list(color = "#1a1a1a", size = 13, 
                    family = "Outfit, sans-serif")
      )
    })
  )
```
